languages.text: "Занимательная демонстрация сил. Ты умеешь вырабатывать энергию?"
"A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"
languages.original_text: "Занимательная демонстрация сил. Ты умеешь вырабатывать энергию?"

traits.locale_text: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"
"A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce machine spark?"
"A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce machine spark?"
"A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"
"A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"
"A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"

languages.text: 「あなたの能力を魅せる。機械の火花を放てるか？」
languages.original_text: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce machine spark?"

languages.text: "Eine überzeugende Darbietung Eurer Fähigkeiten. Könnt Ihr Energie erzeugen?"
languages.original_text: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"

traits.locale_text: "Eine überzeugende Darbietung Eurer Fähigkeiten. Könnt Ihr Energie erzeugen?"

languages.text: «Una demostración fascinante de sus capacidades. ¿Posee la facultad de generar energía?».
languages.original_text: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"

traits.locale_text: «Una demostración fascinante de sus capacidades. ¿Posee la facultad de generar energía?».

languages.text: "Kabiliyetlerinin etkileyici bir göstergesi. Enerji üretebiliyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"

traits.locale_text: "Kabiliyetlerinin etkileyici bir göstergesi. Enerji üretebiliyor musun?"

languages.text: « Voilà une démonstration pour le moins convaincante de vos capacités. Pouvez-vous produire de l'énergie ? »
languages.original_text: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"

traits.locale_text: « Voilà une démonstration pour le moins convaincante de vos capacités. Pouvez-vous produire de l'énergie ? »

languages.text: “这番展示着实了得。你能生成能量吗？”
languages.original_text: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"

traits.locale_text: “这番展示着实了得。你能生成能量吗？”
